text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you're being a worrywart! Really, this is
nothing.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Then again... Yaaawn... I'm getting sleepy just looking at that bed... I think I'll just... take a little nap. Night night. ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Wow! There are pots of chanko everywhere! There's even a pot as big as a sumo ring! I'm in paradise!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, this is amazing. I'll just have a little taste of
this...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Why does my whole body feel so hot all of a
sudden? And I smell like soup too...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
In the... chanko... Ngh... Huh? I feel like I just had
the most wonderful dream.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I can't remember any of it. But now that
I'm awake, I'm hungry. ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Okay, time to make some food! I'll whip up some
chanko with a nice and rich soup base! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her wonderful dream, Hishi Akebono
no longer feels exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What am I doing up in the mountains?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
A-and there aren't even any edible wildflowers
around, let alone veggies!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I don't see the ocean or any rivers either! There's nothing to eat around here!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: What... What should I do if I get hungry, though?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Gasp! O-oh, thank goodness that was just a dream!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Sigh... That was terrifying! I never want to have a dream like that again! Time to eat something yummy and forget all about it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Possibly because of her awful nightmare, Hishi
Akebono remains worn out...
